<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. - File created successfully.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Requirements provided in user query - LeetCode Progress Tracker with React, Vite, TS, localStorage.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Vite React TypeScript project scaffolded and dependencies installed.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented core components, hooks, and logic for the tracker.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Project builds without errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task - No specific task needed, dev server running.

- [x] Launch the Project - Static website, no debug launch required.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - Updated README with project details and cleaned up instructions file.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
